raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wahrduß dsirdeja faplohtija
winſch ſawas Drehbes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniſch patweh-
ſeja tam Preesteram Jlkijum/ un
Aikaimam Sawana Dehſam/
un Akboram Mikaja Dehſam/
un tam Skrihweram Sawa-
nam/ un Asajam tam Kehnika
Kalpam/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eita/ waizajeet to KUN-
GU par mums/ mannis deht un
par teem Landim/ un par winſu
Juhdu/ pahr ſchaß Grahmatas
Wahrdeem/ kas atrasta irr. Jo
ta KUNGA Bahrsiba irr leela/
kas prett mums eedeggufi/ par
to/ ka muſtu Tehwi ſchaß
Grahmatas Wahrduß ne irr
klaufsſchi/ ka tee buhtu darrij-
ſchi pehz winſu / kas preekſch
mums uſrakſtihts irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nogahje tas Preeste-
ris Jlkijus/ un Aikams/ un Ak-
bors/ un Sawans/ un Asajus
pee tahß Praiveetes Uldas/ Sai-
luna Seewas/ ta Dehla Tikwa/
ta Dehla Arasa ta Drehbju-Sar-
ga/ un ta dſihwoja Jeruſalemē
ohtrā Dahtā/ un tee ruñaja ar to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta fazzija us teem:
Ta ſakka tas KUNGS Isra-
eſta Deews: Sakkajt tam Wihr-
ram/ kas juhs pee man fuhtijs irr/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta ſakka tas KUNGS:
Rangi/ es weddiſchu Nelaimi
pahr ſcho Weetu / un pahr win-
ñas Eedſihwotajeem / winſus
Grahmatas Wahrduß/ fo tas
Kehniſch no Juhda irr laſſijs/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Par to/ ka tee mann irr
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "atſtabjuſchi/un zittein Deeveem
kwehpinaifschi/ ka tee mann apſai-
tinatu ar wiſſeem fatweem Roh-
ku Darbeem/ tapehz eedegs man-
na Bahrsiba prett ſcho Weetu/
un ne taps iſdſehſta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet us to Kehniſu no
Juhda/ kas juhs irr juhttis to
KUNGU waizaht/ buhs jums
ta fazzibt : Ta ſakka tas KUNGē
Israeta Deews / pahr teem
Wahrdeem/ fo tu eſti dsirdejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ka tawa Sirde irr
miheſta tappuſi / un tu eſti
preekſch ta KUNGA paſemmo-
jees/ eedsirdedams/ fo es prett
ſcho Weetu/ un prett winnas
Eedſihwotajeem runnajs efmuu /
ka teem buhs pobſta/ un par Lab-
ſtu tapt/ un tu eſti tawas Drehs-
bes faplohtijs/ un manna Preek-
tchā raudajs/ tad es tew arridſan
eſmu paſlanfijs / ſakka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz rangi/ es peclik-
ſhu tew pee tatweem Tehweem/
un tu tupſi ar Meeru tawa Kap-
pā peelikts/ un tawas Azzis ne
redſehs to Launu/ fo es pahr ſcho
Weetu weddiſchu. Un tee atſaz-
zija ſcho Wahrdu tam Kehniſam.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
